design.rationale: marketing_spend already aggregates 6 channels via UNION ALL. Adding TikTok as channel 7 requires: (1) new staging model to standardize TikTok columns, (2) add TikTok CTE to marketing_spend_day_country_agg

models.name: stg_acquisition__tiktok_campaign_report
models.sql_content:
{{ config(materialized='table', schema='acquisition', tags=['acquisition', 'daily']) }}

-- [SOURCE] TikTok Ads campaign data from Fivetran
WITH source AS (
    SELECT * FROM {{ source('tiktok_ads', 'campaign_report') }}
),

-- [RENAME] Standardize to marketing_spend schema
renamed AS (
    SELECT
        campaign_id,
        stat_time_day AS date,
        campaign_name,
        country_code AS country,
        spend AS spend_usd,  -- TikTok reports in USD directly
        clicks,
        impressions,
        conversions,
        _fivetran_synced
    FROM source
),

-- [FINAL]
SELECT
    {{ dbt_utils.generate_surrogate_key(['campaign_id', 'date', 'country']) }} AS md5_key,
    'tiktok' AS channel,
    *
FROM renamed
models.schema_yml_content:
models:
  - name: stg_acquisition__tiktok_campaign_report
    description: Staging model for TikTok Ads campaign report
    columns:
      - name: md5_key
        description: Surrogate key (campaign_id + date + country)
        tests:
          - unique
          - not_null
      - name: campaign_id
        tests:
          - not_null
      - name: date
        tests:
          - not_null
models.sources_yml_content:
sources:
  - name: tiktok_ads
    database: FIVETRAN_DATABASE
    schema: TIKTOK_ADS
    tables:
      - name: campaign_report
        loaded_at_field: _fivetran_synced
        freshness:
          warn_after: {count: 24, period: hour}
          error_after: {count: 48, period: hour}

models.name: marketing_spend_day_country_agg
models.sql_content:
-- MODIFIED: Added TikTok CTE block to existing UNION ALL (channel 7 of 7)
{{ config(materialized='table', schema='acquisition', tags=['acquisition', 'daily']) }}

WITH google AS (...),
meta AS (...),
tiktok AS (
  SELECT
    'tiktok' AS channel,
    date, country, spend_usd, clicks, impressions
  FROM {{ ref('stg_acquisition__tiktok_campaign_report') }}
),
unioned AS (
  SELECT * FROM google UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM meta UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM tiktok
)
SELECT {{ dbt_utils.generate_surrogate_key(['channel','date','country']) }} AS md5_key, * FROM unioned
models.schema_yml_content:
models:
  - name: marketing_spend_day_country_agg
    columns:
      - name: md5_key
        tests: [unique, not_null]

decision_log.decision: multi_source_union pattern — 1 new staging model + 1 modification to existing agg
decision_log.rationale: marketing_spend already aggregates 6 channels via UNION ALL. Adding TikTok as channel 7.
alternatives_considered: Standalone TikTok pipeline — rejected because marketing_spend is the canonical cross-channel table
